label: Drop column bio from user
summary: Drops extra column bio from table user

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'bio'
)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'bio'
)
